Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.2</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.2 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Page is missing h1 heading</p> <div class="element"><body class="DistrictStartPage" style="padding-top: 0px;"><div aria-labelledby="CybotCookiebotDialogBodyContentTitle" aria-modal="true" class="CybotEdge CybotCookiebotDialogActive" data-template="bott</div> <div class="fix">Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>First heading is h2, should start with h1</p> <div class="element"><h2 class="a_dsSectionHeading" id=""> <div class="sectionHeadingContent">Aktuelle saker</div><a aria-label="Gå til arkivet" class="sectionHeadingLink" href="/arkiv/?d=16" target="_self">Gå til arkivet</div> <div class="fix">Start your heading structure with h1</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (21 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a class="a_footerLink" href="https://strategi.fotball.no/" target="_blank"> <div class="a_icon xs white" data-icon="ChevronRight" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="20" </div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo_with_text_white.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3>Ring tlf 98702033</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (17 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 3 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.6</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.6 - Nivå AA)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Heading is empty</p> <div class="element"><h4 class="intro"></h4></div> <div class="fix">Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a class="a_footerLink" href="https://strategi.fotball.no/" target="_blank"> <div class="a_icon xs white" data-icon="ChevronRight" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="20" </div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo_with_text_white.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Norges Fotballforbund</h3> <div class="page-url">https://www.fotball.no/turneringer/?d=16</div> <div>Avvik: 103 | Bestått: 335</div> </div> <div class="issues"> <details><summary>1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (45 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.1.1a</span> <span class="criterion">(1.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>SVG is missing accessible name</p> <div class="element"><svg height="20" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="m256-240-56-56 384-384H240v-80h480v480h-80v-344L256-240Z"></path> </svg></div> <div class="fix">Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 style="margin: 0">Søkeresultater</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="topMenu"> <a href="/turneringer/"> Finn kamper </a> <a href="/landslag/"> Landslag </div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="a_tabulatedLine contentBlockWrapper stickyMobile"> <div class="tabulatedItemsWrapper"> <div class="tabulatedItemWrapper active"> <button class="a_cleanButton tabulatedItem small"> </div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['legend']</p> <div class="element"><ul> <legend class="visuallyhidden">Finn turnering:</legend> <li class="atomicOneThirdWidth a_atomicInput"> <label for="s">Velg sesong</label> <select id="s" name="s"><option selected="selected" value</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 3 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button">Azure<div class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieIn</div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 3 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 3 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button">Azure<div class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieIn</div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (17 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo_with_text_white.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="cardTitle">Mii - Met - Vi Lansering</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (4 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'Enterprise' appears 3 times</p> <div class="element">id="Enterprise"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 class="cardTitle">Klubbutvikling i Finnmark</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (18 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://billett.fotball.no/api/1/samp/registerVisit?tracker=R%2B7Ou9q6l4LGEMTZ32Fr&organization=16261&seasonId=10229342782206&posId=634742277&utm_source=Promotion&utm_medi</div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a class="a_footerLink" href="https://strategi.fotball.no/" target="_blank"> <div class="a_icon xs white" data-icon="ChevronRight" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="20" </div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo_with_text_white.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h1 to h3</p> <div class="element"><h3 style="margin: 0">Menn</h3></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="topMenu"> <a href="/turneringer/"> Finn kamper </a> <a href="/landslag/"> Landslag </div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="a_tabulatedLine contentBlockWrapper stickyMobile"> <div class="tabulatedItemsWrapper"> <div class="tabulatedItemWrapper active"> <button class="a_cleanButton tabulatedItem small"> </div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>List contains non-li elements: ['legend']</p> <div class="element"><ul> <legend class="visuallyhidden">Finn turnering:</legend> <li class="atomicOneThirdWidth a_atomicInput"> <label for="s">Velg sesong</label> <select id="s" name="s"><option selected="selected" value</div> <div class="fix">List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo_with_text_white.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 3 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p><a> element has conflicting role='button'</p> <div class="element"><a aria-expanded="false" class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieProvider CybotCookiebotDialogCollapsed" href="#" role="button">Azure<div class="CybotCookiebotDialogDetailBodyContentCookieIn</div> <div class="fix">Use native <a> semantics or change to appropriate element</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use role='presentation' if decorative</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h2 to h4</p> <div class="element"><h4 class="intro">Deltakerlister kurs, dispsøkander, dommerregninger, honorarskjema, overårige spillere, reiseregning m.m</h4></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.4 Formål med lenke (19 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar -
