screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 3 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input has no label</p> <div class="element"><select id="d" name="d"><option value="19">Agder</option> <option value="3">Akershus</option> <option value="6">Buskerud</option> <option selected="selected" value="16">Finnmark</option> <option value</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input has no label</p> <div class="element"><select id="c" name="c"><option selected="selected" value="0">Alle klubber</option> <option value="1582">Alta Idrettsforening</option> <option value="1612">Ballklubben Sørild</option> <option value="1</div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input has no label</p> <div class="element"><input id="startDate" name="startDate" type="date" value="2026-02-06"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="topMenu"> <a href="/turneringer/"> Finn kamper </a> <a href="/landslag/"> Landslag </div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label</p> <div class="element"><nav class="a_tabulatedLine contentBlockWrapper stickyMobile"> <div class="tabulatedItemsWrapper"> <a class="tabulatedItemWrapper" href="/turneringer/"> <button class="a_cleanButton tabulatedItem smal</div> <div class="fix">Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 2 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (16 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Link opens in new window without indication</p> <div class="element"><a href="https://www.cookiebot.com" rel="noopener" target="_blank" title="Cookiebot">Cookiebot</a></div> <div class="fix">Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers</div> </div> <div class="issue minor" data-severity="minor"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.4</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.4 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo-hvit.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo_with_text_white.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 3 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact minor">MINOR</span> </div> <p>Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til forsiden'</p> <div class="element"><a href="/"> <img alt="Gå til forsiden" src="/gfx/nfflogo_with_text_white.svg" title="Gå til forsiden"/> </a></div> <div class="fix">Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link</div> </div> </details><details><summary>3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 3.3.2</span> <span class="criterion">(3.3.2 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Data table has no caption or label</p> <div class="element"><table class="CookieDeclarationTable"> <colgroup> <col style="width: 20%"/> <col style="width: 20%"/> <col style="width: 35%"/> <col style="width: 15%"/> <col style="width: 10%"/> </colgroup> <thead> </div> <div class="fix">Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Data table has no caption or label</p> <div class="element"><table class="CookieDeclarationTable"> <colgroup> <col style="width: 20%"/> <col style="width: 20%"/> <col style="width: 35%"/> <col style="width: 15%"/> <col style="width: 10%"/> </colgroup> <thead> </div> <div class="fix">Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Data table has no caption or label</p> <div class="element"><table class="CookieDeclarationTable"> <colgroup> <col style="width: 20%"/> <col style="width: 20%"/> <col style="width: 35%"/> <col style="width: 15%"/> <col style="width: 10%"/> </colgroup> <thead> </div> <div class="fix">Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Data table has no caption or label</p> <div class="element"><table class="CookieDeclarationTable"> <colgroup> <col style="width: 20%"/> <col style="width: 20%"/> <col style="width: 35%"/> <col style="width: 15%"/> <col style="width: 10%"/> </colgroup> <thead> </div> <div class="fix">Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 - Use h3 instead of h4</div> </div> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 1.3.1</span> <span class="criterion">(1.3.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Heading level skipped: h2 to h4</p> <div class="element"><h4 class="intro">Skjemaer som kan behøves til administrering av overganger og utlån</h4></div> <div class="fix">Don't skip heading levels. Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Form input only has placeholder, no proper label</p> <div class="element"><input class="inputField" id="qTop" name="q" placeholder="Søk…" tabindex="0" type="search"/></div> <div class="fix">Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.1.1 Tastatur (3 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="facebook" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Facebook', 'Share', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Facebook2" id="" style=""> <svg he</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share pop-window" data-share-type="twitter" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Twitter', 'Tweet', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="TwitterX2" id="" style=""> <svg heig</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> <div class="issue critical" data-severity="critical"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact critical">CRITICAL</span> </div> <p>Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible</p> <div class="element"><a class="share" data-share-type="email" href="" onclick="ga('send', 'social', 'Email', 'SendEmail', location.href);"> <div class="a_icon xs" data-icon="Mail" id="" style=""> <svg height="20" viewbox=</div> <div class="fix">Add href attribute or use a button element</div> </div> </details><details><summary>2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 2.4.1</span> <span class="criterion">(2.4.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact moderate">MODERATE</span> </div> <p>Page has no skip link to bypass navigation</p> <div class="element"><body></div> <div class="fix">Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a></div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue serious" data-severity="serious"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.1</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.1 - Nivå A)</span> </div> <span class="impact serious">SERIOUS</span> </div> <p>Duplicate ID found: 'ad' appears 3 times</p> <div class="element">id="ad"</div> <div class="fix">Each ID must be unique on the page</div> </div> </details><details><summary>4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (32 avvik)</summary> <div class="issue moderate" data-severity="moderate"> <div class="issue-header"> <div> <span class="rule-id">Testregel 4.1.2</span> <span class="criterion">(4.1.2 -
